name: The Simmering Pot
desc: "Spicy without the burn, rich without the grease, bold on the first bite, with a sweet finish." Copy this review and leave a good review and photo to redeem one serving of Waifei Peninsula's handmade beef meatballs at Simmer hot pot.
desc2: Equip to increase Stun Agents' combat capabilities
desc3: Whoa, that's hot! Seriously hot! But it's so good!
phaseDescs: When activating an <ct color=#FFFFFF>Assist Follow-Up</ct>, the equipper's Daze inflicted on the target increases by <ct color=#2BAD00>7.2%</ct>, and DMG dealt increases by <ct color=#2BAD00>7.2%</ct> for 30s. Repeated triggers reset the duration.

When activating an <ct color=#FFFFFF>Assist Follow-Up</ct>, the equipper's Daze inflicted on the target increases by <ct color=#2BAD00>8.2%</ct>, and DMG dealt increases by <ct color=#2BAD00>8.2%</ct> for 30s. Repeated triggers reset the duration.

When activating an <ct color=#FFFFFF>Assist Follow-Up</ct>, the equipper's Daze inflicted on the target increases by <ct color=#2BAD00>9.2%</ct>, and DMG dealt increases by <ct color=#2BAD00>9.2%</ct> for 30s. Repeated triggers reset the duration.

When activating an <ct color=#FFFFFF>Assist Follow-Up</ct>, the equipper's Daze inflicted on the target increases by <ct color=#2BAD00>10.2%</ct>, and DMG dealt increases by <ct color=#2BAD00>10.2%</ct> for 30s. Repeated triggers reset the duration.

When activating an <ct color=#FFFFFF>Assist Follow-Up</ct>, the equipper's Daze inflicted on the target increases by <ct color=#2BAD00>11.5%</ct>, and DMG dealt increases by <ct color=#2BAD00>11.5%</ct> for 30s. Repeated triggers reset the duration.
